abilities.name: Armed and Ready
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Prepare action, it may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Focused Firearm
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or (gun)8".
actions.effects: If this action kills the target, this model gains a Focused token.

triggers.name: Drink Blood
triggers.text: When resolving, this model heals an amount equal to the damage suffered by the target.

triggers.name: Worthy Opponent
triggers.text: Draw a card. If the target was killed, discard a card.

triggers.name: Riddled With Bullets
triggers.text: When resolving, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of the target.

actions.name: Disillusion
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

actions.name: Blast to Bits
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: "Clear Out!"
triggers.text: Immediately, friendly models within (aura)2" of the target may move up to 3".
